summary: Fixed report.mjs: renamed '## Activity' to '## Cost Breakdown' with N/A cost fields, changed attempts threshold from >1 to >=3, added gate warning history recommendations, and guarded against null task.status. Fixed test/report.test.mjs: replaced the stub help test with a real spawnSync invocation of 'agt help report', added tests for attempts:2 not triggering recommendations and for null status handling, and removed dead variables.
